medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Chronic alcohol abuse (100 to 400 g alcohol per day), poor eating habits, withdrawal seizures, aggression, poor concentration, impatience, panic symptoms, blackouts, ataxia, nystagmus, mild Rombergism, brisk reflexes, treated for Wernicke's encephalopathy
medical_history.past_medical_history: Cirrhosis, chronic pancreatitis, frequent hospital attendances for withdrawal seizures
medical_history.social_history: Alcohol abuse (100 to 400 g per day), poor eating habits, worked as circus clown for 15 years, knocked unconscious "a dozen times" during circus routines, worked sporadically in dwarf throwing competitions for 8 to 10 years prior to death, secretive about personal life

physical_examination.general_examination: Laceration 3 cm long below the right eyebrow, marked nicotine staining of the fingers, skull thicker than normal, acute bronchitis (cause of death), severe glycogenic acanthosis of the esophagus, early micronodular cirrhosis and mild fatty change in the liver
physical_examination.specialty_examination: Ataxia, nystagmus, mild Rombergism, brisk reflexes, dilated lateral and third ventricles, thin corpus callosum, fenestrated septum pellucidum, severe superior vermal folial atrophy with gliosis and shrinkage of the folia, neurofibrillary tangles in hippocampal pyramidal neurones

laboratory_examinations.findings: Early micronodular cirrhosis and mild fatty change
Chronic alcohol abuse (100 to 400 g alcohol per day)

radiographic_examinations.findings: Dilated ventricles, fenestrated septum pellucidum, thin corpus callosum, diminished thalamus size, severe superior vermal folial atrophy in cerebellum, neurofibrillary tangles in hippocampal neurones

other_tests.findings: Thick skull, fresh brain weight 1,940 g, fixed brain weight 1,833 g, no contusions, severe chronic pancreatitis, acute bronchitis, severe glycogenic acanthosis of the esophagus

Fenestration of the septum pellucidum, severe superior vermal folial atrophy with loss of Purkinje cells, Bergmann astrogliosis, reduction in granular neurones, neurofibrillary tangles in hippocampal neurones, negative for amyloid precursor protein and beta A4 amyloid protein, Tau-positive neurofibrillary tangles
